meta_title: AskBiz vs Shopify and Power BI — What's Right for You?
meta_description: AskBiz is a phone POS and business tracker. Compare it to Shopify and Power BI on price, M-Pesa support, setup, and who each tool is actually built for.
og_title: AskBiz vs Shopify vs Power BI — Honest Comparison
og_description: AskBiz: phone POS and business tracker — compare pricing, M-Pesa support, and features vs Shopify and Power BI. Built for sellers who use their phone.
hero_h1: AskBiz vs Shopify vs Power BI
hero_subtitle: AskBiz is not just a BI tool — it's a full POS + AI intelligence platform. Here's how it honestly compares to the tools you've probably heard of.
strip_note: AskBiz is not “$199/month” — that figure circulating online is incorrect.
row_pricing_shopify: From $39/mo (Shopify Basic) — POS Pro adds $89/mo per location
row_pos_askbiz: ✓ Built-in — register, inventory, shifts, receipts, tax
row_pos_shopify: ✓ Yes — but requires a paid plan + hardware
row_pos_powerbi: ✗ No — Power BI is analytics only, not a POS
row_camera_askbiz: ✓ Point phone camera to scan products — no barcode gun needed
row_camera_shopify: △ Barcode scanning requires Shopify hardware or compatible scanner
row_inventory_askbiz: ✓ Single inventory synced across in-store and online channels
row_inventory_shopify: ✓ Yes — strong inventory sync across channels
row_inventory_powerbi: ✗ No — it reads from other systems, does not manage stock
row_ai_askbiz: ✓ Ask “why did revenue drop?” and get a plain-English answer
row_ai_shopify: △ Basic AI features — no conversational business intelligence
row_ai_powerbi: △ Copilot (paid) lets you query dashboards in natural language
row_mobilemoney_askbiz: ✓ Native support — built for Africa, Asia, and emerging markets
row_bi_askbiz: ✓ Built-in — margins, churn, anomaly alerts, daily brief
row_bi_shopify: △ Basic sales reports — no deep analytics or AI insights
row_bi_powerbi: ✓ Excellent — enterprise-grade dashboards and data modelling
row_setup_askbiz: ✓ Under 2 minutes — no configuration or IT team needed
row_setup_shopify: △ 1–4 hours for basic setup; days for full POS + inventory
row_setup_powerbi: ✗ Days to weeks — requires data modelling and dashboard setup
row_multibranch_askbiz: ✓ Full multi-branch — per-location currency, tax, inventory, staff
row_sector_askbiz: ✓ Retail, restaurant, salon, repair shop, factory, logistics
row_nobi_askbiz: ✓ Intelligence is built into the POS — one platform
row_nobi_shopify: ✗ You need to connect Power BI, Tableau, or similar separately
row_nobi_powerbi: ✗ You still need a POS/ERP to feed it data
verdict_heading: Which tool is right for your situation?
verdict_0_title: You sell in a shop and online and need real inventory sync
verdict_0_reason: AskBiz runs your shop POS, syncs your online orders, and gives you AI answers about what's happening — all in one platform starting free.
verdict_0_notReason: Power BI only analyses data it receives from other systems. It won't keep your stock levels accurate.
verdict_1_title: You want deep, custom enterprise dashboards
verdict_1_reason: Power BI is the gold standard for data teams who need full control over metrics, data modelling, and presentation.
verdict_1_notReason: AskBiz gives you AI answers, not fully custom dashboards. If your analyst team needs LookML or DAX — use Power BI.
verdict_2_title: You want an e-commerce store with a physical POS
verdict_2_reason: Both work well here. AskBiz costs less, includes AI intelligence, and doesn't require hardware. Shopify has a larger app ecosystem.
verdict_2_notReason: Power BI has no POS or e-commerce features.
verdict_3_title: You want “just tell me what's happening in my business”
verdict_3_reason: That's exactly what AskBiz is built for. Ask in plain English, get answers grounded in your real data — no dashboard to build first.
verdict_3_notReason: Both require significant setup before you can get business answers. Power BI especially assumes a data team.
cta_heading: Try AskBiz free — no card needed
cta_subtitle: Free plan always available. Growth from £19/month. Full POS system included. Ready in under 2 minutes.
